system.flavor: With no weapon at all, you batter your foes like loose leaves.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. On hit: +1d3 damage
Area Effect: 2 damage.
On hit an updraft in free space adjacent to your target. You may place any number of these zones.

Updraft
Zone
Effect is an obscured space. Yourself or allies inside count as +1 space of elevation higher than their base space.

Dominant a second updraft.
